name: harness-craft
description: Behavioral craft skills distilled from obra/superpowers (MIT): skill-tdd (author skills via RED-GREEN-REFACTOR pressure testing), atomized-briefing (context-free plans for formation workers / subagent dispatch), root-cause-debugging (Iron Law + 3-failed-fixes architecture escalation). The explicitly-behavioral annex to harness-core's structural hooks: superpowers teaches, harness enforces — this plugin imports the teaching half and wires it into the enforcing half.
